no_empty_blocks_available: There are no empty blocks in this semester. Adding this course will create a new extra block.
filter_by_master_field_or_type: Filter by master, field, or type...
how_to_proceed: How would you like to proceed?
in_one_of_the_following_fields: in one of the following main fields
mobile_warning_subtext: Please visit us on a desktop or laptop computer.
mobile_warning_text: This website is optimized for desktop devices and doesn't support mobile phones.
try_adjusting_your_filters_or_search_ter: Try adjusting your filters or search terms.
_about_contribute_desc: We are a small team and always open to thoughtful contributions.
_about_description: Master Picker helps LiU students compare master programs, understand requirements, and plan courses without getting lost in spreadsheets.
_about_devs_mikael_desc: Hope you are doing good! Remember that you can learn anything :D
_about_devs_petrus_desc: People First. God Always. Code cool stuff!
_about_honorable_lukas: For help with LiU statistics and general support at the end of the project.
_about_honorable_tristan: For the help with promoting the project and providing feedback.
_about_support_bug_text: Send us an email at <email>{{email}}</email> with the details so we can fix it!
_about_support_description: Unfortunately we lose money on this site :(
_about_support_help_text: We would love your support to keep the project running and free for everyone. You can help by sharing the project with friends, providing feedback, or contributing code if you are a developer.
_about_why_p1: We built Master Picker after seeing how hard it was to answer simple questions like “Which courses are required?” or “What fits in my schedule?” The information existed, but it was spread across many places.
_about_why_p2: We believe that we have created a tool that can help students make informed decisions and plan their studies without getting lost in spreadsheets. We hope it can save time and reduce stress for many students in the future.
_course_eval_desc: Scores represent the weighted average of student feedback for this course instance.
_course_eval_none: No evaluation data available for this course.
_course_stat_none: No statistical data available for this course.
_dashboard_disclaimer_full: Master Picker is a third-party site. Always verify your selections via the <0>LiU program page</0>.
_dashboard_credits_master_total: total credits for the Master's degree
_dashboard_share_text: Check out my Master Picker schedule!
_guide_description: Required courses are added automatically. This master requires you to choose between several course options. Don't worry, you can change your choices later if you change your mind!
_guide_options_desc: This group has {{count}} options. You need to select at least {{min}}.
_guide_required_desc: These courses are mandatory and will be added automatically to your schedule.
_guide_step_elective_todo: Has not chosen all elective courses
_guide_step_required_todo: Has not confirmed all required courses
_guide_title_0: Big W. Time to set up your schedule.
_guide_title_1: Solid pick, let's map this out.
_guide_title_2: You cooked. Let's build your schedule.
_guide_title_3: Elite pick. Let's lock this schedule in.
_guide_title_4: Say less. Let's set up your schedule.
_guide_title_5: Low-key perfect choice. Let's map your plan.
_guide_title_6: Nice, that's fire. Let's build your schedule.
_guide_title_7: Massive W. Let's speedrun your schedule.
_guide_title_8: You just min-maxed your life. Let's spec your timetable.
_guide_title_10: Bro chose peak. Deploying schedule now.
_guide_title_11: That pick goes hard. Let's assemble the timeline.
_guide_title_12: Main-character decision. Let's queue up your schedule.
_guide_title_13: NPCs are impressed. Let's configure your daily quest log.
_landing_header_subtitle: Drop the crazy spreadsheets, embrace effortless course planning.
_semester_settings_extend_blocks: Extend available blocks for this semester
_selected_block_occupied_by: The selected block for {{code}} is already occupied by:
_wildcard_warning_text: Potential collision: A standard course is in a wildcard slot.
